**W3 DONE ŌĆö generate-dialog + sidebar polish (FE-only, /loom M, FE wiki+book-tabs vitest 61/61 [GenerateWikiDialog 13 incl +kind_codes ┬Ę new WikiSidebar 2] ┬Ę tsc clean ┬Ę eslint clean ┬Ę i18n parity ├Ś4, /review-impl 1 LOW folded + 2 accepted):** the generate dialog's `''`-vs-model overload became an explicit **segmented mode toggle** [Mß║½u cß╗æ ─æß╗ŗnh | AI tß║Īo sinh], and the sidebar header now shows the **AI-authored split**. **PO (CLARIFY): AI-no-model disables Confirm ┬Ę sidebar N=loaded list, M=AI within.** **`GenerateWikiDialog`:** new `mode: 'stub'|'llm'` (segmented control for batch; regen has no toggle = always AI); stub mode hides the model picker + spend cap; AI mode shows the picker with a disabled `pickRequired` placeholder; `selectMode('stub')` clears the picked model + spend (kills the token-spend leak the M7b-2a F1 also guarded); `canConfirm` requires a model in AI mode; a11y `role=radiogroup`+`aria-label`. **`WikiTab` `WikiSidebar`:** `aiCount` memo (`generation_status != null`) ŌåÆ header `t('articles',{count:articles.length})` + `┬Ę t('aiSplit',{count:aiCount})`; **exported `WikiSidebar`** for isolated testing; dropped the now-redundant `total` prop (server `total` is still the empty-state gate ŌĆö the loaded-list count is the right number for the header, matching the rendered rows). i18n ├Ś4 `gen.mode.{label,stub,llm}` + top-level `aiSplit`(+`_other`). **/review-impl:** F1 (LOW, **folded**) ŌĆö added a `kind_codes` batch pass-through test (the deterministic-by-kind path was untested; W3 didn't change the logic but the refactored test file is its home). **Accepted:** F2 (LOW) AI-mode-with-zero-models is a soft dead-end but the toggle-back-to-stub escape exists (not a regression); F3 (COSMETIC) the open-reset effect could reset mid-open if `entityIds` ever became reachable while open ŌĆö currently unreachable behind the modal. **No BE/contract change.** Plan W3 section.

**W4a DONE ŌĆö persist per-entity job results + live pass tracking (knowledge-only, /loom L, knowledge wiki sweep 248ŌåÆ249 [orchestrator 12 incl +4 W4a ┬Ę lifecycle +1 status projection] ┬Ę ruff clean, /review-impl 1 LOW folded + 1 MED + 2 LOW tracked):** the screen-Ōæó results-table data layer. **PO (CLARIFY): rich-but-compact results + BUILD live pass tracking** (not deferred). Glossary's job-status proxy returns the knowledge body **verbatim** (`io.ReadAll`), so this is knowledge-only ŌĆö new fields flow to the FE with zero glossary change. **Schema (`migrate.py`, additive `ALTER`):** `results JSONB DEFAULT '{}'` (entity_id ŌåÆ `{outcome, citations, flags, name}`) + `current_entity_id`/`current_pass`. **Repo (`wiki_gen_jobs.py`):** `WikiGenJob` +3 fields (+`_parse_obj`); `record_result` (idempotent `|| jsonb_build_object` upsert); `set_progress`; live pointer cleared in `pause`/`complete`/`fail`, reset in `mark_running`. **Orchestrator (`orchestrator.py`):** `_generate_one` ŌåÆ `EntityResult{outcome,citations,flags,name}`; writes a preliminary `processing` row once the name is known (live row nameable; queued entities absent), `set_progress` before each pass (`contextŌåÆgenerateŌåÆverifyŌåÆreviseŌåÆwriteback`), records the final result for **every** outcome (incl. `writeback_failed`/`skipped`/defensive `error`); per-pass writes are best-effort (`_set_pass`/`_record` swallow + debug-log). **Status (`internal_wiki.py`):** `WikiGenJobStatus` +`results`/`current_entity_id`/`current_pass`. **/review-impl:** #4 (LOW, **folded**) non-zero citation/flag capture test. **Tracked:** **`D-WIKI-W4-RESULTS-64KB`** (MED) ŌĆö a >~600-entity job nears the glossary proxy's 64KB `io.LimitReader` body cap ŌåÆ truncated JSON breaks the whole poll; mitigations: name truncated to 60 + compact detail; real fix (W4b/ops) = bump the proxy cap or cap/paginate `results`. **#2 (LOW)** the defensive `error` path clobbers the name (rarely fires ŌĆö `_generate_one` never raises). **#3 (LOW)** a crash mid-entity leaves a stale `processing` row (resume overwrites). **`D-WIKI-W4A-LIVE-SMOKE`** ŌĆö the repo upsert/clear SQL is mocked (knowledge units mock the pool, per M7b precedent); a real generate ŌåÆ poll showing per-entity results + live `current_pass` advancing is the stack-up smoke. Plan W4a section.

**W4b DONE ŌĆö per-entity results table + live pass (FE-only, /loom M, FE wiki+book-tabs vitest 68/68 [WikiGenJobDetail 7 new] ┬Ę tsc clean ┬Ę eslint clean ┬Ę i18n parity ├Ś4):** the screen-Ōæó detail. **PO (CLARIFY): collapsible panel persists after run + labeled step counter.** New **`WikiGenJobDetail.tsx`** ŌĆö a collapsible panel under the banner: a row per `results` entry (outcome icon ┬Ę name ┬Ę ­¤ōÄcites ┬Ę ŌÜĀflags), sorted **processing-first**; the live entity's row shows a spinner + `VerifyingŌĆ” (3/5)` mapping the 5 BE passes (`gen.pass.*`); `expanded = open ?? isActive` (auto-open running ŌåÆ auto-collapse complete, user toggle sticks), dismissable, `N queued` footer; `key={job_id}` resets per job. **`types.ts`** +`WikiGenPass`/`WikiEntityResult` + extended `WikiGenJobStatus` (optional `results`/`current_entity_id`/`current_pass` ŌĆö the hook needs NO change, they arrive on `job` via the verbatim proxy). `WikiTab` mounts it after both banners. i18n ├Ś4 `gen.results`/`gen.outcome`/`gen.pass`. **No BE/contract change.** Plan W4b section. **­¤Åü W4 (job-progress detail) COMPLETE.**

**W5 DONE ŌĆö per-step revise model (cross-service XL: knowledge Py + glossary Go + frontend, /loom, knowledge orchestrator 25 [+3 revise-model] + ruff ┬Ę glossary go build/vet + 2 trigger-forward tests ┬Ę FE wiki 71/71 [+5 dialog incl regen+revise] + tsc + eslint + i18n ├Ś4, /review-impl 1 LOW folded + 3 accepted) ŌĆö clears DEFERRED 076 `D-WIKI-PER-STEP-MODEL`.** **CLARIFY reframe:** the mockup's "verify model" doesn't fit ŌĆö `verify_article` is **rule-based** (CanonVerifier, no LLM); the only LLM in the verify/fix phase is `revise_article`'s corrective re-gen. **PO: the second model = the revise/correction model** ("write with A, fix canon-flagged articles with B"); **null ŌćÆ prose model**. Optional picker, AI mode, **batch + regen**, default "Same as generation". Columns named `revise_model_*` (honest to rule-based verify). **Knowledge:** `wiki_gen_jobs` +`revise_model_ref`/`revise_model_source` (additive nullable); `WikiGenJob`/`create`/`WikiGenerateRequest` thread them; orchestrator's `revise_article` uses the override (**paired fallback keyed on `revise_model_ref`**, source defaults `user_model`). **Glossary:** `triggerWikiGeneration` + `generateWikiStubs` forward both keys (**omit-when-empty** ŌåÆ knowledge sees null ŌåÆ prose fallback). **FE:** `GenerateWikiDialog` second optional picker (reset on open/stub, hidden in stub); `api.ts` + `useWikiGenJob` thread `revise_model_ref` (hook pairs the source); i18n ├Ś4 `gen.reviseModel.*`. **/review-impl:** #1 (LOW, **folded**) regen+revise FE test. **Accepted:** #2 handler-level pairing untested (the orchestrator re-defaults the source ŌĆö defense in depth); #3 `create()` 10-param INSERT unit-mocked (counts hand-verified; real run ŌåÆ live-smoke); #4 a bad revise model degrades silently (keeps the un-revised article, same as prose-failure semantics). **The revise model only fires on canon-FLAGGED articles** (clean ones never revise) ŌĆö surfaced in the picker hint. **`D-WIKI-W5-LIVE-SMOKE`** ŌĆö end-to-end (pick a revise model ŌåÆ generate a flagged article ŌåÆ the corrective re-gen uses the override) needs a stack-up; each hop is unit-proven. Spec/plan [`2026-06-11-wiki-w5-per-step-model.md`](../plans/2026-06-11-wiki-w5-per-step-model.md).

W1/W2/W3/W4/W6a/W6b-1 all live-verified.** **`D-WIKI-W5-LIVE-SMOKE` = PARTIAL** (revise picker + real gen verified; no canon-FLAGGED article occurred so the revise-override path didn't fire ŌĆö still needs a flagged-article run). **Note:** the `entity.updated`ŌåÆstaleness consumer pipeline (W2/Phase-2, not W6b) did NOT auto-flag on this shared stack ŌĆö the staleness row was seeded directly to test the W6b diff; **Ō£ģ W2 STALENESS-AUTO-FIRE ŌĆö ROOT-CAUSED + FIXED + LIVE-PROVEN (2026-06-11/12, `/loom` M, this session).** The "entity_updatedŌåÆstaleness didn't auto-fire" symptom was **not** a W2/consumer bug ŌĆö the staleness consumer, outbox relay, and W6b diff all work. The gap was one **missing emit**: `patchAttributeValue` (the handler the **manual entity editor uses for attribute fields like "Description"**) wrote the value + bumped the entity version but emitted **no** `glossary.entity_updated` event ŌåÆ manual attribute edits reached neither wiki-staleness, glossary_syncŌåÆNeo4j, nor learning-service. (In E2E the description edit went through this path ŌåÆ nothing fired; the SQL-`short_description` workaround also bypassed the app.) **Fix:** `patchAttributeValue` now wraps its write in a tx and emits the event transactionally (`actor_type='user'`, before/after ŌĆö parity with `patchEntity`), with the K3.3b `short_description` regen moved **inside** the tx so the after-snapshot reflects it (new `pgxExecQuerier` lets the regen helper run on pool or tx). Files: [`attribute_handler.go`](../../services/glossary-service/internal/api/attribute_handler.go) + [`apply_edit_handler.go`](../../services/glossary-service/internal/api/apply_edit_handler.go) (regen call sig) + new [`attribute_handler_test.go`](../../services/glossary-service/internal/api/attribute_handler_test.go). **Verify:** 9/9 change tests green on a fresh DB (pkg-wide 9 fails = pre-existing shared-DB isolation, proven identical via stash); **live smoke:** PATCH Õ╝ĀĶŗźÕ░ś desc via gateway ŌåÆ 200 ŌåÆ `glossary.entity_updated(user)` ŌåÆ relay ŌåÆ StalenessConsumer ŌåÆ **auto `wiki_staleness` pending + `is_knowledge_stale=true`** (~30s relay-batch latency; dedup verified on µ▒ĀńæČ). 0-diff non-description edits ŌåÆ learning `noop` class (excluded by default) ŌĆö benign, same as `patchEntity`.

**Ō¢Č NEXT ŌĆö natural moves:** (1) open a **PR** `wiki/phase2-change-control` ŌåÆ main (branch pushed); (2) remaining live-smokes: **`D-WIKI-W5-LIVE-SMOKE`** (flagged-article revise-override), earlier P2/M8; (3) the **`D-WIKI-W4-RESULTS-64KB`** proxy-cap fix + **`D-WIKI-W6B2B-REGATHER-COST`** perf; (4) the **platform system-config UI** epic once its auth-conflict clears.

**Ō¢Č M8 flywheel COMPLETE; the wiki Phase-2 branch is at a clean stopping point.**

**D-PLATFORM-SYSTEM-CONFIG-UI ŌĆö CLARIFY+PLAN DONE, BUILD DEFERRED (conflict-blocked, DEFERRED 075).** Scoped the admin/system-config epic to surface the M8 flags (+ all ops flags) at runtime without an env redeploy. **PO-locked at CLARIFY:** full RBAC ┬Ę runtime-apply via shared store + cached reads ┬Ę all typed config (bool+int+float) ┬Ę sliced **S0ŌåÆS4** (each its own `/loom`) ┬Ę config store = **new `config-service`** (Go/Chi). Architecture + per-slice file targets/acceptance/tests are written up: spec [`2026-06-11-platform-system-config-ui.md`](../specs/2026-06-11-platform-system-config-ui.md) + plan [`2026-06-11-platform-rbac-system-config.md`](../plans/2026-06-11-platform-rbac-system-config.md). **BUILD intentionally NOT started** ŌĆö another agent is concurrently making large auth/permission changes; S0 (RBAC) lands in the same auth-service files (high conflict risk). **Pick-up:** wait for that work to merge to `main`, re-baseline S0 against the new auth shape (reuse, don't duplicate), branch `platform/rbac-system-config` off main, `/loom` S0 from CLARIFY. **/review-impl MANDATORY on S0/S1** (privilege-escalation surface).

**Ō¢Č Other wiki follow-ups (optional):**
- **Live-smokes (deferred, low-risk/unit-pinned):** D-WIKI-P2-KG-SWEEP-LIVE-SMOKE (parity-on-stack: generate ŌåÆ sweep no-change ŌåÆ **0 kg_drift** ŌåÆ mutate a relation ŌåÆ flag it); D-WIKI-P2B-COST-ESTIMATE-LIVE-SMOKE; D-WIKI-M8-LEARNING-LIVE-SMOKE (inject wiki.corrected ŌåÆ a corrections row).
- **D-WIKI-P2-SWEEP-DISMISS-RESWEEP** ŌĆö a *dismissed* drift row (recipe + kg) is re-filed by the next sweep (the `ON CONFLICT ŌĆ” WHERE status='pending'` guard doesn't see dismissed rows). Pre-existing with recipe-drift; needs a dismiss-vs-resweep suppression design.
- **D-WIKI-P2-KG-SWEEP-PROJECT-PARITY** ŌĆö the sweep resolves `projects[0]` fresh while generation froze `job.project_id`; single-project-safe but a multi-project book could false-drift. Store the generating `project_id` in `build_inputs` to make it project-exact.
The wiki Phase-2 change-control (push source-drift + pull recipe/KG-drift) + the M8 collect half are complete; the M8 scoring + few-shot halves are next (build + test, default-off).

### Ō¢Č WIKI LLM-BUILDING (branch `wiki/llm-gen` off `main`) ŌĆö M0ŌåÆM8 + M7a COMPLETE + live-smoke PASSED + MERGED (PR #28) (2026-06-11)

**State: DESIGN v3 complete (spec + mockup) + 2 pre-existing data-loss bug fixes BUILT & committed** (first commits on the branch, *before* the feature ŌĆö `/loom` L, **17 tests green on real Postgres**, /review-impl clear).

**Bug fixes (this commit):**
- **Bug 1** ŌĆö merge silently abandoned a loser's `wiki_article` when BOTH sides had one (violated merge-spec AC4 "no silent data loss"; composed with Bug 2 into permanent loss). **Fix:** `wiki_articles.superseded_by_entity_id` archive-in-place (revision-preserved) + `getWikiArticle` redirectŌåÆwinner (`redirected_from`) + `merge_journal.superseded_wiki_article_id` for symmetric un-merge. Bodies NOT auto-merged (deferred to wiki-LLM ┬¦5.4).
- **Bug 2** ŌĆö kind-delete `ON DELETE CASCADE` silently destroyed articles+revisions+suggestions. **Fix:** entity FK `CASCADEŌåÆRESTRICT` + kind-delete deletes articles explicitly + **count in 200** response (was silent 204) + `wiki.deleted` outbox event (both kind-delete & user-delete, atomic in-tx). superseded_by FK `ON DELETE SET NULL` (anti-dangle).
- Files: `migrate.go` ┬Ę `merge_handler.go` ┬Ę `wiki_handler.go` ┬Ę `kinds_crud.go` ┬Ę `outbox.go` + tests (`wiki_dataloss_test.go` new, `merge_handler_test.go`/`kind_aliases_test.go`). Plan [`2026-06-08-wiki-dataloss-bugfix.md`](../plans/2026-06-08-wiki-dataloss-bugfix.md).
- **/review-impl:** 0 HIGH; 1 MED (redirect untested ŌåÆ HTTP test added w/ a **book-service mock harness** ŌĆö reusable for the LLM feature) + 4 LOW + 1 COSMETIC **all fixed + re-verified**.

**Design (spec v3 [`2026-06-08-wiki-llm-building.md`](../specs/2026-06-08-wiki-llm-building.md) ┬Ę mockup `-mockup.html`, 5 screens):** wiki = **deferred-sync materialized view** over a versioned knowledge base. Home = **knowledge-service** (Python; glossary stays SSOT front door). LLM contract = **constrained Markdown ŌåÆ IR ŌåÆ deterministic TipTap mapper** (NOT LLM-emits-TipTap). Generate = **bounded multi-pass** (writeŌåÆdeterministic rule-gateŌåÆCanonVerifierŌåÆ1├Śrevise, keep-if-improved). **Change-control:** capture (MVP: `wiki_article_source_usage` + `build_inputs` fingerprint) ŌåÆ defer (DB `wiki_staleness` ledger + sweep, **NOT realtime CDC**) ŌåÆ decide (**user-gated** regen, cost-capped). Locked PO decisions: BookProfileŌåÆ**move to book-service**; spoiler = capture-horizon + reader-gate; ledger = DB-table+sweep; feedback+eval flywheel in MVP.

**MERGED to main (PR #25 @ 2ace6272):** bug-fixes + design v3. **Phase-1 plan committed** (`e9313ef0`, [`2026-06-08-wiki-llm-gen-phase1.md`](../plans/2026-06-08-wiki-llm-gen-phase1.md)) ŌĆö contract-first (IR ┬Ę MarkdownŌåÆIRŌåÆTipTap ┬Ę **citation mark = anti-hallucination feature, FE+BE** ┬Ę writeback/schema/fingerprint), M0-M8 milestones, 15 risks surfaced.

**BookProfile decision REVERSED ŌåÆ option (A):** STAYS in lore-enrichment (AI-domain, LLM detection `profile_suggest.py`), read via a NEW internal-token `GET /internal/lore-enrichment/books/{id}/profile` ŌĆö NOT moved to book-service (Go/CRUD can't host the LLM detection = wrong boundary). **LE-runner verified:** build a fresh ~150-line wiki orchestrator reusing the generic job infra (state-machine/cost-budget/events/meter/LLM-seam/verify-gate), NOT clone the gap/proposal-coupled `JobRunner`.

**M0 DONE** (`app/wiki/`, knowledge-service, pure, /loom L, **ruff + 14 unit tests green**, /review-impl clear): render-agnostic **IR** (`WikiArticleIR/Block/Span/Source`) + **dep-free constrained-markdownŌåÆIR parser** (cite-lift ┬Ę drop-unknown-as-hallucinated ┬Ę grounded-flag ┬Ę spoiler `source_chapter_max`) + **mappers** `IRŌåÆTipTap` (ContentRenderer vocab + `citation` mark w/ jump-anchor + References) ┬Ę `IRŌåÆmarkdown` (round-trips) ┬Ę `IRŌåÆplaintext`. /review-impl: removed dead `quote` block-type (round-trip drift) + 3 coverage tests; LOW-3/4 documented.

**M1 DONE** (cross-service: lore-enrichment + knowledge-service, /loom M, **LE pytest 19/19 + knowledge client 7/7 green**, /review-impl 0 HIGH/MED): BookProfile read via **option A** (LE stays the authored home). LE: NEW `internal_router` + `GET /internal/lore-enrichment/books/{book_id}/profile` ([`app/api/book_profile.py`](../../services/lore-enrichment-service/app/api/book_profile.py); `require_internal_token` guard, reuses `get_book_profile`+`_profile_view`, neutral-default never-404, no owner-check = internal token is the trust boundary; additive). knowledge: NEW `app/clients/book_profile_client.py` ŌĆö frozen `BookProfile` (worldview/language/era_policy/voice/anachronism_markers) + `BookProfileClient` with **TTL cache (PO decision B, 60s)** ŌĆö one HTTP call per book per job, edited profile picked up after TTL, **a failed read is NOT cached** (transient LE-down/recovery retries next call) + graceful-degrade-to-neutral (mirrors `BookClient`, never raises). config (`lore_enrichment_service_url`/timeout/`book_profile_cache_ttl_s`) + compose `LORE_ENRICHMENT_SERVICE_URL`. /review-impl: 1 LOW fixed (malformed-typed-200ŌåÆneutral degrade test pins the never-raise invariant vs pydantic ValidationError-subclass version-drift); 3 documented (unbounded-but-tiny cache won't-fix ┬Ę silent cross-svc drift ŌåÆ tracked by live-smoke ┬Ę `require_internal_token` sibling-import cosmetic).

**M2 DONE** (knowledge-service only, /loom L, **ruff + retriever 5 + context 7ŌåÆ9 + raw_search 23 (behavior-preserved) + 280 sweep green**, /review-impl 0 HIGH/MED): retrieval+context layer. **`app/search/retriever.py`** = `run_hybrid_search` fusion core EXTRACTED from the `search_book` HTTP handler ŌĆö takes an **already-resolved `project`** (caller owns the ownership gate; 404 stays at HTTP layer), **never raises** (degraded markers, not HTTPException), identical lexical+semantic+RRF+rerank+floor+cap. Handler now delegates (behavior preserved = the 23 endpoint tests are the guard). **`app/wiki/context.py`** = `gather_entity_context` ŌĆö glossary brief (`fetch_entities_by_ids`) + 1-hop KG (`find_relations_for_entity`) + passages (in-process `run_hybrid_search`, query = name+aliases); **sanitizes ALL untrusted text** (name/kind/aliases/desc/KG/passages) via the existing `injection_defense.neutralize_injection` SDK shim; assigns **gapless cite-labels G1/K1../P1..** ŌåÆ M0 IR `Source` table; `ContextSource` separates full prompt-text from truncated stored snippet; `None` on missing/nameless entity; degrades on not_indexed/KG-down (risk #9). **`app/wiki/__init__.py` kept PURE** (context imported directly, not re-exported, to keep the IR surface dep-light). **Q2-B (sanitizeŌåÆSDK) was already satisfied** by mui#3 + knowledge's K-adopt shim ŌåÆ REUSED (zero SDK edit, zero LE re-point). /review-impl: 3 LOW fixed (passage label-gap running-counter, kind_code sanitize, whitespace-skip + 2 tests), 1 accepted (retrieverŌåöcontext seam-mock).

**M3 DONE** (knowledge-service only, /loom L, **ruff + prompt 7 + rulegate 4 + generate 7 = 18 green + 318 wiki sweep**, /review-impl 0 HIGH/MED): the **single-pass generation proof**. **`app/wiki/prompt.py`** (pure) = `build_messages(brief, profile, items)` ŌåÆ constrained-Markdown contract (## sections / prose / `-` bullets / `>` enriched-only) + **cite-only-our-labels** + synthesize-don't-copy + **#14 no-infobox-restate** + BookProfile-shaped language/voice/era/anachronism; renders `[cite_id] (kind) FULL-text`. **`app/wiki/rulegate.py`** (pure) = `evaluate(ir) ŌåÆ GateResult` ŌĆö **Q2-A permissive**: pass iff non-empty Ōł¦ Ōēź1 grounded cited claim (no-hollow-stub); ungrounded ratio is a SOFT reason, not a fail (CanonVerifier M4 is the real gate). **`app/wiki/generate.py`** = `generate_article(context, profile, llm, ŌĆ”)` ŌĆö buildŌåÆ`submit_and_wait("chat")`ŌåÆ`parse_article`(M0)ŌåÆgateŌåÆ**bounded 1├Ś corrective retry**ŌåÆtyped `GenerateResult{status: ok|skipped_no_grounding|empty|llm_failed, ir, gate, attempts, raw_markdown, degraded}`; **never raises**; **reuses the existing `LLMClient`** (NOT cloned ŌĆö knowledge already has it). **Q1-A**: takes a PRE-BUILT context+profile (M6 orchestrates the gather/cost loop). risk #6 = `max_tokens` budget + total parser. /review-impl: 2 LOW fixed (M2 `context.degraded` now carried through `GenerateResult`; +test that `[FICTIONAL]`-tagged context survives into the prompt = M2 defense effective at the prompt boundary), 2 accepted (build_messages safe for pydantic-validated inputs; mis-citation is M4's job).

**M4 DONE** (knowledge-service only, /loom L ŌĆö *reclassified XLŌåÆL mid-CLARIFY when Q2-B's cross-service scope dissolved*, **ruff + canon 6 + verify 10 + cite 5 + revise 6 = 27 green + 395 wiki sweep**, /review-impl 0 HIGH/MED): the grounding-SDK quality gate wrapping M3's result. **`app/wiki/canon.py`** = `extract_canon_terms` (jieba CJK proper-nouns + Latin Capitalized, ported from LE `canon_lookup.py`, conservative/under-fires) + `make_canon_lookup(brief)` over the entity `short_description` (**Q2-B collapsed single-service**: glossary's canon IS the `short_description` column, already in the M2 context ŌåÆ NO new glossary endpoint). **`app/wiki/verify.py`** = IRŌåÆ`ProposalLike` + **section-level `FactLike[]`** (Q1-A) adapters ŌåÆ SDK `CanonVerifier` (injection/anachronism/regurgitation/contradiction) ŌåÆ `verify_article ŌåÆ WikiVerifyResult{passed, publish_blocked, reject_reason, degraded, flags[]}`; **`decide_auto_reject` ported VERBATIM** from LE `wiring.py` (injection / HIGH-contradiction / Ōēź2-distinct-anachronism / HIGH-regurgitation ŌåÆ publish-blocked). **`app/wiki/cite.py`** = `compose_provenance_cites` ŌĆö actually-cited sources ŌåÆ `GroundingCite` ŌåÆ **`compose_cites` (SDK's FIRST live consumer**, risk #5); glossary canon (score None) ranks first; uncited dropped. **`app/wiki/revise.py`** = `revise_article` 1├Ś verify-corrective re-gen + **publish-block-aware `is_improved` keep-if-improved** (never worsens); `generate.py` +`initial_corrective` (additive). jieba added to `requirements.txt`. /review-impl: 1 LOW fixed (keep-if-improved was count-only ŌåÆ block-aware `is_improved` + regression test), 1 noted (D-WIKI-M4-NEUTRALIZED), 1 accepted (degraded vestigial ŌĆö in-memory canon never raises).

**M5 DONE** (cross-service: glossary Go + knowledge Py, /loom XL, **glossary writeback 11/11 incl 7 clobber-guard DB tests LIVE on dev Postgres + wiki/merge green ┬Ę knowledge fingerprint 5 + writeback 10 + 117 sweep**, /review-impl 0 HIGH, 1 MED fixed): the WRITE path. **Glossary:** migration (C6 ŌĆö 6 `wiki_articles` gen cols + `wiki_article_source_usage` table + stub-revision `ownerŌåÆ'system'` migration; **+ FIXED a latent non-idempotent FK migration** ŌĆö the Bug-2 block matched ANY FK to glossary_entities but BOTH entity_id_fkey & superseded_by_fkey do, so an unordered SELECT dropped superseded_by and failed to apply CASCADEŌåÆRESTRICT; the entity FK was STILL CASCADE on dev ŌĆö now column-targeted+idempotent, RESTRICT live-verified). `wiki_writeback.go` = `POST /internal/books/{id}/wiki/articles` (X-Internal-Token) with **clobber-guard as an ALLOWLIST** (overwrite ONLY `ai`/`system` draft; human/unknown author ŌåÆ `wiki_suggestion`, never clobbered) + source_usage replace + `wiki.generated` outbox, all in-tx. stub `author_type='owner'ŌåÆ'system'` going forward (REQUIRED for clobber correctness). **Knowledge:** `fingerprint.py` (C7 `build_inputs` + ported `_stable_hash`, Python-only), `writeback.py` (`build_writeback_body`: M0 `ir_to_tiptap` + M4 cites/flags + ┬¦5.1 source_usage reverse index + generation_status generated/needs_review/blocked), `glossary_client.write_wiki_article` (graceful-degrade). /review-impl: 1 MED fixed (clobber denylistŌåÆallowlist), 2 LOW accepted (stub-summary detection; D-WIKI-M5-SUGGESTION-DEDUP regen pile-up).

**M6 DONE** (cross-service knowledge Py + glossary Go, /loom XL, **knowledge orchestrator 7 + trigger 4 + consumer-drain 3 + 149 wiki sweep ┬Ę glossary go build green ┬Ę per-book lock LIVE-VERIFIED on dev Postgres**, /review-impl 0 HIGH): the integration capstone tying M2ŌåÆM5 per entity. **­¤Åü Phase-1 LLM wiki-generation pipeline (M0ŌĆōM6) COMPLETE.** **Knowledge:** `wiki_gen_jobs` table (mirror extraction_jobs + book_id/entity_ids/items_done + **partial-unique per-book lock** `(book_id) WHERE active`, risk #13) + `WikiGenJobsRepo` (createŌåÆ`ActiveJobExists` 409, atomic mark_entity_done, **list_resumable**) + **`app/wiki/orchestrator.py`** `run_wiki_gen_job` (fresh ~150-line per-entity pipeline: gather_contextŌåÆgenerateŌåÆverifyŌåÆreviseŌåÆcite+fingerprintŌåÆbuild_bodyŌåÆwriteback; **budget-pause-before-spend**, **skip-done resume**, **never-raises-per-entity**; risk #12 reuse-generic-not-clone-LE) + trigger `POST /internal/knowledge/books/{id}/wiki/generate` (202/404/409/400 + XADD `loreweave:events:wiki-gen`) + flag-gated stream consumer (`wiki_gen_processor`, OFF by default, **startup-drain of orphaned pending/running jobs**) + lifespan wiring + config flags. **Glossary:** `generateWikiStubs` `model_ref`ŌåÆ**delegate** to the knowledge trigger (additive; deterministic stub = untouched fallback). /review-impl: 1 MED fixed (orphan-drain durability ŌĆö was: re-trigger 409s + '$' skips ŌåÆ stuck job leaks the lock), 1 LOW fixed (writeback-failure surfacing), 2 documented (D-WIKI-M6-CONSUMER-GROUP multi-replica, D-WIKI-M6-RESUME).

**Ō£ģ E2E LIVE-SMOKE PASSED (2026-06-09, `D-WIKI-M6-E2E-LIVE-SMOKE` cleared ŌĆö collapsed M3/M4/M5 smokes too):** rebuilt knowledge+glossary, created a project for the Dracula book `019e97e4` (36 entities), enabled `WIKI_GEN_ENABLED`, triggered 3 entities via **gemma-4-26b** (model `51ea9fd7`, LM Studio). **M7a DONE** (frontend, /loom L, **vitest 6/6 + tsc 0 + i18n parity ├Ś4**, /review-impl 0 HIGH): the anti-hallucination **CitationMark** trust layer. `components/reader/CitationChip.tsx` = `[n]` chip + hover/focus **popover** (cited snippet ŌĆö NO live fetch ŌĆö + source badge + relevance % + **jump-to-source** `/books/{id}/chapters/{ch}/read?block=N`, reusing raw-search P3-A precise-scroll); `CitationContext.tsx` = optional bookId provider (no prop-drill); `InlineRenderer` routes the `citation` mark ŌåÆ chip (body = superscript via the mapper's separate superscript mark; References = full-size w/ label intact); `components/editor/CitationMark.ts` = `Mark.create` (attrs match M0 JSON ŌåÆ citations survive edits) registered in `TiptapEditor`. Wrapped `WikiTab`'s reader in `CitationProvider`; the shared `InlineRenderer` covers the public reader too (jump link appears when a provider gives bookId, else popover-only ŌĆö still auditable). i18n ├Ś4 `reader.citation.*`. /review-impl: 1 MED fixed (keyboard a11y ŌĆö focus-within so the jump link is tab-reachable), 1 LOW fixed (score `[0,1]` guard); a review-found References-label-drop bug fixed in REVIEW. **Note:** no dedicated public wiki-article FE PAGE exists yet ŌĆö when one lands, wrap its `ContentRenderer` in `CitationProvider` for jump links.

**M7b-1 DONE** (BE slice; cross-service knowledge Py + glossary Go, /loom XLŌåÆsliced, **knowledge wiki pytest 108/108 [incl 9 new job-lifecycle + 1 orchestrator-abort] ┬Ę glossary go vet/build/api-pkg green [+7 proxy/client/auth tests]**, /review-impl 0 HIGH, 1 MED fixed): the job-lifecycle BE the FE (M7b-2) sits on. **PO decisions: glossary-proxy surface (B)** [FE talks ONLY to `/v1/glossary`; glossary forwards to knowledge internal] **+ slice BE-first**. **Knowledge:** `WikiGenJobsRepo` +`get_latest_for_book(book,user)` (poll ŌĆö returns the latest job regardless of status, unlike active-only `get_active_for_book`) +`resume` (pausedŌåÆpending, SQL-guarded) +`cancel` (pending|pausedŌåÆcancelled, releases the per-book lock via the existing partial-unique index ŌĆö no migration) +`_affected` tag-parse; `internal_wiki.py` +`GET ŌĆ”/wiki/job?user_id=` (404 no-job) +`POST ŌĆ”/job/{id}/resume` (validate owner+pausedŌåÆrepo.resume+XADD re-enqueue; 409 not-paused) +`POST ŌĆ”/job/{id}/cancel` (owner+pending|paused; **409 on running**). **Glossary:** `knowledge_client.go` +`getWikiGenJob`/`wikiGenJobAction` (PROPAGATE status, not degrade-to-nil ŌĆö user-initiated); `wiki_jobs.go` +3 proxy handlers (JWT + `verifyBookOwner` ŌåÆ pass user_id to knowledge) + `/wiki/job` routes; `wiki_handler.go` exposes **`generation_status`** (list) + **`generation_provenance`/`generated_at`** (detail) for the needs_review/blocked badges (C6 cols, no migration; public reads verified safe ŌĆö bespoke projections). **/review-impl F1 (MED) fixed:** `mark_running` was an unguarded write ŌåÆ a cancel landing before the orchestrator started was silently resurrected (run + token-spend); now a **claim** (`AND status IN ('pending','running')` + rows-affected) and the orchestrator **aborts** (returns 'cancelled') when it can't claim. F2/F3/F4 LOW accepted. **Closes D-WIKI-M6-RESUME.**

**M7b-2a DONE** (frontend only, /loom XLŌåÆsliced, **vitest 18/18 [hook 7 + dialog 5 + banner 6] ┬Ę tsc 0 ┬Ę i18n parity ├Ś4 [82 keys]**, /review-impl 0 HIGH, 1 MED fixed): the FE generate-dialog + job lifecycle. **PO decisions: unified Generate dialog (A)** [model dropdown defaults to "Deterministic stubs (no LLM)"; picking a chat model ŌåÆ LLM gen] **+ single-article-regen-with-tiny-BE (ŌåÆ2b)** **+ slice 2a/2b**. `features/wiki/`: `types.ts` (`WikiGenJobStatus` + `WikiGenerateResult` union), `api.ts` (`generateStubs` +model_ref/model_source/max_spend_usd typed union; `getJob`/`resumeJob`/`cancelJob`), `hooks/useWikiGenJob.ts` (controller ŌĆö poll `getJob` `refetchInterval` 2s while pending|running / off otherwise / 404ŌåÆnull; `trigger` branches deterministic-vs-delegate + handles 202/409/404/none with toasts; `resume`/`cancel`; completionŌåÆarticle-list invalidate as a ref-guarded sync-effect), `components/GenerateWikiDialog.tsx` (model picker + optional kind filter + spend-cap; reset-on-open), `components/WikiGenJobBanner.tsx` (status/progress strip; resume on paused, cancel on pending|paused, **no controls while running** ŌĆö BE 409s running-cancel). `WikiTab.tsx`: Sparkles opens the dialog (was one-click stub) + renders the banner. i18n ├Ś4 `gen.*`. **/review-impl F1 (MED) fixed:** the always-mounted dialog persisted a prior LLM selection across reopen ŌåÆ defeated the deterministic default + risked an unintended token-spend; now resets to defaults on open. F3 COSMETIC fixed (once-guard test); **F2 LOWŌåÆD-WIKI-M7B-GEN-LIMIT**; F4 accepted.

**M7b-2b DONE** (cross-service glossary Go + frontend, /loom XL, **frontend vitest 26/26 [hook 7 + dialog 6 + banner 6 + badge 4 + flags 3] ┬Ę tsc 0 ┬Ę i18n parity ├Ś4 [101 keys] ┬Ę glossary go vet/build/api-pkg green [+2 parseEntityUUIDs tests]**, /review-impl 0 HIGH, 1 MED fixed): badges + verify-flags + single-article regenerate. **PO: Regenerate on ALL articles (B)** [clobber-guard files a `wiki_suggestion` for a human-edited one]. **Glossary:** `generateWikiStubs` +`entity_ids` passthrough in the delegate branch via `resolveDelegateEntityIDs` (UUID-validated ŌåÆ 400 on bad; **book-scoped** ŌĆö explicit ids filtered to in-book active entities). **Frontend:** `types.ts` (+`generation_status` on list+detail, `WikiVerifyFlag`, `WikiGenerationProvenance`), `api.ts`/`useWikiGenJob` (thread `entity_ids`), `components/WikiGenBadge.tsx` (needs_review/blocked/generated chip; subtle on sidebar rows), `components/VerifyFlagsPanel.tsx` (verify-flag display: kind┬Ędimension┬Ęevidence, severity-colored), `GenerateWikiDialog.tsx` (**regen-mode**: requires a model [deterministic skips article-having entities], sends `entity_ids`, hides the kind filter), `WikiTab.tsx` (badge on sidebar rows + article header + **Regenerate** button + flags panel). i18n ├Ś4 `gen.regen*`/`badge`/`flags`. **/review-impl F1 (MED) fixed:** the explicit `entity_ids` path validated UUID format but NOT book ownership (unlike the batch path) ŌĆö a client could trigger generation on a foreign entity (writeback's `entBook != bookID` guard blocked the *write*, but generation still ran on wasted tokens); now book-scoped at the glossary owner-gate layer. F2/F3 LOW accepted. **­¤Åü wiki LLM-gen FE (M7a + M7b-1/2a/2b) COMPLETE.**

**Ō£ģ D-WIKI-M7B-LIVE-SMOKE PASSED (2026-06-10)** ŌĆö rebuilt knowledge+glossary on the M7b code (origin pushed to `dd2f4493`), drove the whole FEŌåÆglossaryŌåÆknowledge path through the gateway (JWT, test acct, Dracula book `019e97e4`, model `51ea9fd7` gemma-4-26b): (1) **M7b-1 reads** ŌĆö `generation_status` on the wiki list (Mina/Count=`generated`, Jonathan Harker=`needs_review`), full `generation_provenance` on detail (citations/verify_flags/build_inputs/model_ref), the job-status endpoint = `complete 3/3`; (2) **M7b-2b** ŌĆö a real `needs_review` verify-flag (`regurgitation/medium`, the VerifyFlagsPanel payload), **single-article Regenerate** via the `entity_ids` passthrough ŌåÆ `202` ŌåÆ `complete 1/1` ŌåÆ article revision bumped + fresh `generated_at`; (3) **F1 book-scoping** ŌĆö a FOREIGN `entity_id` ŌåÆ `{"action":"none"}` (filtered, no job), malformed ŌåÆ `400`, mixed foreign+own ŌåÆ `202` (own-only); (4) **job lifecycle** ŌĆö budget-pause (`max_spend=0.001` ŌåÆ `paused reason=budget`) ŌåÆ **RESUME** (`202`, pausedŌåÆpending) ŌåÆ **CANCEL** (`200 cancelled`) ŌåÆ **lock released** (fresh trigger `202`, not `409`). Zero 500s. Closes D-WIKI-M6-RESUME live too. (Dev note: `KNOWLEDGE_WIKI_GEN_ENABLED=true` on the running knowledge container until its next plain recreate.)

**M8 DONE** (cross-service glossary Go + knowledge Py, /loom XL, **knowledge eval pytest 7/7 ┬Ę glossary go vet/build green + 3 M8 emit DB-integration tests PASS on dev Postgres ┬Ę LIVE-SMOKE PASSED**, /review-impl 0 HIGH, 1 MED fixed): the feedback flywheel (emit) + thin advisory eval. **PO: whole M8 + eval via the glossary API (A).** **Glossary:** `outbox.go` +`wiki.corrected` (transactional, emitted from `patchWikiArticle` when the prior latest revision was `author_type='ai'` ŌåÆ the AI-draftŌåÆhuman-edit gold pair; carries `prior_generation_status`) +`wiki.suggestion_reviewed` (from `reviewWikiSuggestion`, action + `was_ai_generated`). **MVP = emit-only** (the `learning-service` consumes the gold as few-shot in a follow-up; knowledge's event dispatcher routes by type + safely skips these). **Knowledge:** `app/benchmark/wiki/metrics.py` (pure: `verify_flag_rate` over the list's `generation_status`, `citation_resolvability` over body citation marks = snippet+anchor present) + `run_wiki_eval.py` (reads via the glossary API, `--gate` advisory) + 7 unit tests. **/review-impl F2 (MED) fixed:** a human correction now CLEARS `generation_status`+`generation_provenance` in the same tx (the human owns it ŌåÆ the stale needs_review badge + verify-flags panel disappear; the AI-origin audit lives in the revision history + the `wiki.corrected` event). **LIVE-SMOKE (2026-06-10):** eval harness GATE PASS over the live API (3 AI articles, verify-flag-rate 0.33, resolvability 1.00); `wiki.corrected` outbox row confirmed after a live AI-article PATCH. **­¤Åü­¤Åü wiki LLM-generation feature COMPLETE: M0ŌåÆM8 + M7a all built, reviewed, and live-proven.**

**Ō¢Č NEXT SESSION ŌĆö wiki is feature-complete; remaining is Phase-2 + follow-ups:**

2. **Phase-2** (change-control: `wiki_staleness` ledger + a fingerprint sweep over the M5 `build_inputs` + the "Knowledge updates" change-feed ŌĆö see spec ┬¦5.2/┬¦5.3 + plan ┬¦IV).
3. **Follow-ups (spec ┬¦11):** learning-service consumer of `wiki.corrected`/`suggestion_reviewed` (gold ŌåÆ few-shot in `prompt.py`); LLM-judge groundedness eval; per-step model routing.

**Recently cleared (wiki):** Ō£ģ **D-WIKI-M6-RESUME** (2026-06-10, M7b-1 ŌĆö resume (pausedŌåÆpending+re-enqueue) + cancel (releases the per-book lock) endpoints shipped via the glossary proxy; /review-impl F1 hardened `mark_running` into a claim so a cancel can't be resurrected) ┬Ę Ō£ģ **D-WIKI-M6-E2E-LIVE-SMOKE** + **D-WIKI-M3/M4/M5-LIVE-SMOKE** (2026-06-09 ŌĆö the full M0ŌåÆM6 pipeline generated 3 Dracula articles end-to-end on the live stack via gemma-4-26b; provenance + source_usage + citation marks + clobber-guard all verified live, see the Ō£ģ block above) ┬Ę Ō£ģ **D-WIKI-M1-LIVE-SMOKE** (the BookProfile read ran in the live generation path ŌĆö neutral default, no profile set on the Dracula book).

**Deferred (wiki):**
- Ō£ģ **D-WIKI-M6-CONSUMER-GROUP DONE (2026-06-18, /loom S).** `run_wiki_gen_consumer` converted from bare `XREAD '$'` ŌåÆ a Redis consumer **group** (`wiki-gen-workers`) with a per-process consumer name (`hostname-pid`) + ack-after-process: with Ōēź2 knowledge replicas each job message is now delivered to exactly ONE replica (no double LLM spend). Group create is `MKSTREAM`+BUSYGROUP-safe (idempotent); the read loop (`_consume_batch`, factored for testability) tails `'>'`; `CancelledError` re-raised for clean shutdown. `drain_resumable_jobs` stays the row-based crash-durability backstop (so no DLQ/reclaim scaffold needed). +4 unit tests (process-then-ack, empty-noop, malformed-still-acks, BUSYGROUP-safe-create+close). Deferred: `D-WIKI-M6-CONSUMER-GROUP-LIVE-SMOKE` (multi-replica exclusivity needs 2 live replicas + flag-on ŌĆö not smoke-able single-replica; correct by XREADGROUP construction + unit-tested).
- **D-WIKI-M7B-RUNNING-CANCEL** (M7b-1 DESIGN) ŌĆö cancel is scoped to pending|paused (the stuck-lock case is budget-`paused`). A *running* job returns 409: the orchestrator processes entities sequentially without polling status mid-loop, so a cooperative running-cancel needs a per-entity status re-check (abort between entities). The M7b-2a banner reflects this (no cancel button while running). Add when an operator needs to stop a long in-flight run; today it self-terminates (complete/pause) and the F1 claim-guard prevents a cancelled job from being resurrected.
- **D-WIKI-M8-LEARNING-CONSUMER** (M8 follow-up, spec ┬¦4.11) ŌĆö the `wiki.corrected`/`wiki.suggestion_reviewed` events are EMITTED (transactional outbox ŌåÆ `loreweave:events:glossary`) but not yet CONSUMED. Build the learning-service consumer (`corrections` + `quality_scores`, target_kind='wiki_article') + feed the gold AI-draftŌåÆhuman-edit pairs as few-shot into `prompt.py`. The emit contract is live; the consumer is the flywheel's second half.
- **D-WIKI-M8-EVAL-PLUS** (M8 follow-up, spec ┬¦4.12) ŌĆö the eval is thin/advisory (verify-flag-rate + citation-resolvability, deterministic). Follow-ups: coverage (`recall_at_k`), LLM-judge groundedness + a discrimination probe, a Fengshen golden corpus, and persisting runs for trend tracking. Wire the `--gate` into CI once thresholds are calibrated on a real corpus.
- **D-WIKI-M7B-GEN-LIMIT** (M7b-2a /review-impl F2) ŌĆö the glossary delegate's `resolveWikiGenEntities` defaults to `genLimit=50`; a book with >50 entities of a chosen kind generates only the first 50, and the banner's "50/50" reads as complete (the drop is silent). Pre-existing (M6) but the M7b-2a UI surfaces it. Expose a limit control in the Generate dialog, or have the delegate return a `dropped` count the banner can show.
- **D-WIKI-M6-PRECISE-COST** (M6) ŌĆö the cost-cap charges a configured per-article ESTIMATE (`wiki_gen_cost_per_article_usd`), not real tokens (the LLMClient meters via provider-registry but doesn't surface per-call cost to the orchestrator). Wire real per-job metering when the provider-registry usage seam is exposed.
- **D-WIKI-M5-LIVE-SMOKE** (M5, cross-service) ŌĆö the clobber-guard SQL + migration are live-proven against dev Postgres (via the HTTP handler), but the full **knowledgeŌåÆglossary network POST** round-trip (knowledge's `write_wiki_article` actually calling a running glossary) isn't exercised yet. It collapses into the M6 end-to-end live-smoke (a real entity generates ŌåÆ writes back on the live stack).
- **D-WIKI-M5-SUGGESTION-DEDUP** (M5 /review-impl LOW-3) ŌĆö repeated AI regen over a human-edited article files a NEW `wiki_suggestion` each time (no dedup) ŌåÆ can pile up in the review queue. Accept for M5 (M6 controls regen cadence); add upsert-by-(article, pending) or a "latest AI suggestion wins" rule if it surfaces.
- **D-WIKI-M4-LIVE-SMOKE** (M4, risk #5) ŌĆö CanonVerifier + `compose_cites` are unit-tested only; the first live run over REAL retrieved passages (verify flags + provenance cites on the actual stack) rides with M6 when generation runs end-to-end. `compose_cites` is the SDK's first live consumer ŌĆö verify the real-passage dedup/rank then.
- **D-WIKI-M4-NEUTRALIZED** (M4 /review-impl LOW-2) ŌĆö `verify_article` drops the SDK `VerifyResult.neutralized` map (safe text for injection-flagged fields). Fine at M4 (publish-blocked articles aren't persisted as-is), but **M5 must persist the neutralized text** if it stores a flagged article as a `wiki_suggestion`. Thread `neutralized` through `WikiVerifyResult` when M5 wires the suggestion path.
- **D-WIKI-M3-LIVE-SMOKE** (M3) ŌĆö real LLM generation is unit-tested with a mocked LLMClient only; the first actual `generate_article` against a live model (grounded article from real context + a real prompt ŌåÆ markdown ŌåÆ IR ŌåÆ gate) lands when the M6 orchestrator + trigger + model-pick exist. Live-verify a grounded Fengshen-entity article generates + passes the gate on the real stack then (also exercises risk #2 cite round-trip + #6 truncation on real output).
- **D-WIKI-M1-LIVE-SMOKE** (M1, cross-service) ŌĆö `BookProfileClient`ŌåÆLE round-trip is mock-only (both tests encode LE's `_profile_view` shape independently ŌåÆ a silent contract drift wouldn't be caught). First real cross-service call lands when M2/M3 wires `get_profile` into generation; live-verify the round-trip on the Õ░üńź×µ╝öńŠ®/õĖćÕÅżńź×ÕĖØ stack then (curl the LE internal endpoint with the internal token + confirm knowledge reads it). LE endpoint itself is a thin reuse of the already-live `get_book_profile`.
- **D-WIKI-SEED-ROBUSTNESS** (test-infra, /review-impl COSMETIC-1) ŌĆö `migrate.Seed` guards on table-empty; on a shared test DB a prior 'unknown' kind makes default-kind seeding skip ŌåÆ merge fixtures lose 'character'. Worked around in the merge fixture (seed-if-missing); root-cause fix = make `migrate.Seed` per-kind idempotent (`ON CONFLICT (code) DO NOTHING`) ŌĆö separate cleanup task.
- **D-WIKI-DELETEKIND-CONTRACT** (LOW-4) ŌĆö kind-delete 204ŌåÆ200 `{deleted_wiki_articles}`; FE `apiJson` tolerates 200+body (verified). Doc only.
- Design deferrals in spec v3 ┬¦11 (BookProfile cross-service home, `compose_cites` first-live smoke, precise KG-edge events, recycle-bin GC must-not-CASCADE).

### Ō¢Č RAW SEARCH (branch `raw-search/foundation`, off `origin/main`)

**State: Phase-1 + 2 + 3(A,C,D) + P3-EVAL + E5 + E5B + E6 DONE + LIVE-SMOKE PASSED (2026-06-08).** Hybrid (lexical+semantic, RRF) + cross-encoder rerank end-to-end, surfaced in the search UI, with precise jump-to-source for both legs. Branch pushed (origin/raw-search/foundation). New workstream ŌĆö the missing **raw chapter-text** layer beneath glossary/knowledge/wiki (all lossy derivatives); serves authoring + extraction/tr├Łch-lß╗źc. Spec [`2026-06-07-raw-search.md`](../specs/2026-06-07-raw-search.md) (PART I design + PART II ATAM-lite eval; 7/7 confirm-at-BUILD resolved). Plan [`2026-06-07-raw-search.md`](../plans/2026-06-07-raw-search.md) (3 phases; ADJ-1..4 PO-acked).

**Phase-1 BE (book-service, commit a956fbb3):** `BE-1` pg_trgm + `idx_chapter_blocks_trgm` GIN as a **best-effort Exec in `Up()`** (review-impl MED-1 ŌĆö NOT in `schemaSQL`). `BE-2` `GET /v1/books/{id}/search?q=&surface=&limit=` ŌĆö JWT + `ensureOwnerBook`; **ILIKE-primary + `similarity()` rank** over draft `chapter_blocks`; rune-offset highlight; `surface:"draft"`/`matchType:"lexical"`; `purge_pending`ŌåÆ404. 6 test funcs; go build/vet/test green. /review-impl: MED-1/MED-2/LOW-1/LOW-2 fixed.

**Phase-1 FE-1 (frontend):** `features/raw-search/` ŌĆö `useRawSearch` (TanStack, min-len 1, **debounced 250ms**), `renderHighlight` (consumes BE **code-point** offsets via `Array.from` ŌćÆ resolves the UTF-16/supplementary-plane caveat), `RawSearchResultCard` (draft + matchType badges), `RawSearchPanel`; `RawSearchPage` at route `/books/:bookId/search` + a Search button on `BookDetailPage`; `rawSearch` i18n ├Ś4. **vitest 7/7 ┬Ę tsc --noEmit 0 ┬Ę i18n parity OK.** /review-impl: MED-1 (native-button Space double-fire ŌĆö dropped redundant `onKeyDown`) + MED-2 (added debounce) fixed.

**Phase-2 P2a (BE hybrid):** knowledge orchestrator `GET /v1/knowledge/books/{id}/search?query=&mode=hybrid|semantic|lexical` ŌĆö bookŌåÆproject resolve = ownership gate (`404 not_indexed`); legs via `asyncio.gather`: lexical (`BookClient.lexical_search` ŌåÆ book-service **internal** `/internal/books/{id}/lexical-search`, shared `runLexicalSearch` core) + semantic (`embed_query_cached` + `find_passages_by_vector(source_type="chapter")`); **RRF** (k=60) + per-chapter cap 3 (`app/search/hybrid_fusion.py`); per-leg degradation never 500s. Plan [`2026-06-07-raw-search-phase2.md`](../plans/2026-06-07-raw-search-phase2.md). knowledge **pytest 41/41** + book-service go green. /review-impl: MED-1 (book_client test) + LOW-4 (dim-mismatch test) fixed.

**Phase-2 P2b (frontend):** `rawSearchApi.searchHybrid` ŌåÆ `/v1/knowledge/books/{id}/search`, **falls back to the book-service lexical endpoint on 404 OR any 5xx** (review-impl MED-1) + injects a `degraded.semantic` note (MED-2); `useRawSearch` **mode toggle** (Hybrid default / Lexical) + `degraded` passthrough; `RawSearchResultCard` handles semantic hits (`location.chunkIndex`, `chapterTitle:null`, match-type chip); panel mode toggle + degraded banner; `rawSearch` i18n +4 keys ├Ś4. **vitest 14/14 ┬Ę tsc 0 ┬Ę i18n parity OK.** /review-impl: MED-1 (5xx fallback) + MED-2 (degraded-on-fallback) fixed; 1 reject-path test removed (vitest 2.1.9 unhandled-rejection quirk ŌĆö behaviour inspection-covered).

**Live-smoke PASSED (2026-06-07, real stack vs Õ░üńź×µ╝öńŠ® demo book, rebuilt book+knowledge from branch):** P1 lexical ŌĆö `Ķø¤ķŠŹ`/`ńīøĶÖÄ`/`Ķō¼ĶÉŖ` each return the draft hit with **rune-correct CJK highlights** (`[9,11]`/`[20,22]`/`[4,6]`) + exact-substring score boost; `õ╣ŠÕØżÕ£ł`ŌåÆclean 0-hit. **R1 (pg_trgm on Classical Chinese) CLEARED**; rune offsets exact (byte would be 3├Ś off); pg_trgm migration ran on startup (no 500 ŌćÆ best-effort Exec works). P2 hybrid orchestrator ŌĆö `mode=lexical` fuses the cross-service book-internal hit (RRF), `mode=semantic` runs clean (0 passages, no degrade), `mode=hybrid` fuses both; ownership gate 200; **no 500 on any path. Zero bugs.** Residual: a *positive* semantic match unverified (demo book has no ingested chapter passages).

**Phase-3 P3-A jump-to-source (frontend):** result click ŌåÆ opens the chapter **reader** at `/books/{id}/chapters/{ch}/read?block=N`; `ReaderPage` reads `?block` and scrolls the matched block to centre once content renders (reuses `ContentRenderer`'s `data-block-id` + the TTS scroll path ŌĆö full reader renders all blocks, no virtualization). **Lexical** hits scroll precisely (blockIndex matches the rendered Tiptap content array); **semantic** hits open the chapter (top) ŌĆö `chunkIndex` is a passage index, not a block index. **vitest 18/18 ┬Ę tsc 0.** /review-impl: virtualization risk cleared by inspection; +semantic-nav test; block-alignment assumption documented.

**Phase-3 P3-D semantic titles (knowledge):** orchestrator batch-enriches semantic hits' `chapterTitle` via `BookClient.get_chapter_titles` (`_enrich_titles`, best-effort, UUID-keyed) ŌĆö lexical hits already had titles. **pytest 42/42.** Clears D-RAWSEARCH-P2-SEMANTIC-TITLES. /review-impl: key-type contract verified UUID-keyed (no false-green); LOW title-format inconsistency noted.

**P3-EVAL retrieval eval harness (XL, 2026-06-08):** the missing **measurement** layer ŌĆö raw-search shipped with mock-only tests; "live-smoke PASSED" only proved not-500. Spec [`2026-06-07-raw-search-eval.md`](../specs/2026-06-07-raw-search-eval.md) ┬Ę plan [`2026-06-07-raw-search-eval.md`](../plans/2026-06-07-raw-search-eval.md). Built E0ŌĆōE4: **E0** seed `scripts/seed_rawsearch_eval.py` + in-container `app/benchmark/ingest_rawsearch_corpus.py` ŌåÆ imported **40 ch of õĖćÕÅżńź×ÕĖØ** (book `019ea2fc-ffc7-7dc6-8f09-1f8625584b59`, project `019ea2fd-0523-7c3d-ab59-72c0c0a73a3b`, test acct) ŌåÆ **3337 chapter_blocks (lexical) + 115 `:Passage` (semantic, local bge-m3, FREE)**; **E1** golden `app/benchmark/rawsearch_golden.json` (18 oracle-mined queries ŌĆö 12 exact/3 paraphrase/3 negative, graded for NDCG); **E2** `app/benchmark/metrics.py` +`hit_at_k`+`ndcg_at_k` (**pytest 15/15**); **E3** runner `scripts/run_rawsearch_eval.py` (3 modes ├Ś K + per-mode table); **E4** `app/benchmark/flat_knn_rawsearch.py` (exact-cosine ANN baseline). **Live results:** hybrid **MRR 0.97 / hit@5 1.0 / ndcg@5 0.86** > lexical & semantic on every metric (RRF earns its keep); **ANN recall 0.96** (index near-exact); embeddings proven real (stored vector ŌēĪ fresh LM-Studio re-embed, **cosine 1.0**). **Two real product findings ŌåÆ E5:** lexical **oracle-recall 0.63** (`limit=10`+cap=3 under-cover wide terms) and **score = positional RRF floor 0.0164** (non-calibrated, can't threshold junk). Verdict: **good at finding (jump-to-source), mediocre at exhaustive mining (recall)** ŌĆö bones good, recall needs one tuning pass.

**E5 recall + calibrated score + golden expansion (L, 2026-06-08):** plan [`2026-06-08-raw-search-e5-tuning.md`](../plans/2026-06-08-raw-search-e5-tuning.md). **Root cause of recall 0.63:** lexical SQL returned a flat block `LIMIT` ŌåÆ wide-term blocks clustered into few chapters. **Fix:** `granularity=chapter|block` ŌĆö `chapter` = best-block-per-chapter window-fn SQL (`lexicalSearchChapterSQL`, max distinct-chapter recall / navigate; **new default**), `block` = all matching blocks (exhaustive mine); per-hit **`relevance`** (0ŌĆō1: lexical sim/1.0-exact, semantic cosine) added on both legs + `apply_relevance_floor` (`min_relevance` param). Orchestrator: `cap=1` (chapter) / lifted (block); floor applied post-fusion. Golden expanded **18ŌåÆ33** via committed `scripts/build_rawsearch_golden.py` (exact incl. wide / phrase / paraphrase / **typo** / negative). **book-service** go green ┬Ę **knowledge pytest 43/43**. **Isolated live result (new code, SAME old golden ŌĆö apples-to-apples):** lexical **oracle-recall 0.63ŌåÆ0.953**, lexical recall@10 0.57ŌåÆ0.83, hybrid recall@10 0.75ŌåÆ**0.94**, ndcg@10 0.80ŌåÆ0.90; on the broader 33-q set hybrid recall@10 0.86 (wide terms cap it). ķ╗äµ×üÕóā chapter mode = **31/31** distinct chapters; block mode exhaustive (50). **/review-impl:** MED-1 (confounded headline ŌåÆ re-measured isolated 0.953), MED-2 (cross-surface cap test+comment ŌĆö chapter mode = 1 row/chapter across surfaces), LOW-3/4/5 documented. **Score-floor calibration finding:** bge-m3 cosine here is compressed [0.68ŌĆō0.82] with poor neg/pos separation (Õ░üńź×µ”£ 0.733 > a real positive 0.706) ŌåÆ **no global threshold cleanly filters junk**; floor **OFF by default** (documented), real junk-rejection needs a reranker ŌåÆ `D-RAWSEARCH-E5B-RERANK`.

**E5B cross-encoder rerank (XL, 2026-06-08):** the junk-rejection a global cosine floor couldn't do (E5 finding: bge-m3 cosine non-separable). External rerank service (separate repo, [integration guide](../integrations/2026-06-08-rerank-service-integration.md)) verified ŌĆö Cohere-compatible `/v1/rerank` + load/unload/TTL; full-golden separation: positives median 0.86 vs negatives max 0.29 ŌåÆ floor **0.30** rejects 5/5 negatives, ~0 genuine positives lost. Plan [`2026-06-08-raw-search-e5b-integrate.md`](../plans/2026-06-08-raw-search-e5b-integrate.md). **Routed through provider-registry** (PO choice; platform-config `RERANK_URL`+token, NO BYOK credential/encryption). **provider-registry (Go):** `internal/provider/rerank.go` (`Rerank` Cohere-shape helper, no Adapter) + `internalRerank` handler + `POST /internal/rerank` + config `RERANK_*` (3 tests). **knowledge (Py):** `reranker_client.py`, `_apply_rerank` in `raw_search.py` (rerank fused top-`max(30,2*limit)` ŌåÆ re-sort ŌåÆ `min_rerank_score` floor; semantic+hybrid only, lexical skips; `rerank`/`min_rerank_score` params; **degrade-to-fusion** never-500), config + deps (+4 tests). compose `RERANK_*` env. harness `--rerank`. **go rerank tests + knowledge pytest 2086 pass.** **Live (full stack knowledgeŌåÆprovider-registryŌåÆreranker):** 5/5 negatives ŌåÆ **0 results** (`degraded={}` ŌĆö rerank ran), positives kept rel **0.95ŌĆō0.99**, hybrid **MRR 0.955ŌåÆ1.0**, ndcg@10 ~flat, recall@10 0.86ŌåÆ0.82 (precision/recall trade ŌĆö `rerank=false`/`block` recover recall). **/review-impl:** MED-1 hypothesis testedŌåÆdowngraded (Ķø«ńź×µ▒Ā 10ŌåÆ6 = correct precision, not coverage bug); LOW-1 (`pool_n=2*limit`) + LOW-2 (docstring) fixed; LOW-3/4/5 deferred.

**E6 FE (L, 2026-06-08):** surfaced E5/E5B in the raw-search UI. Plan [`2026-06-08-raw-search-e6-fe.md`](../plans/2026-06-08-raw-search-e6-fe.md). `features/raw-search/`: **Navigate/Mine** granularity toggle (chapter best-per-chapter / block exhaustive), **thin relevance score bar** on result cards (`role=meter`, fill=calibrated 0ŌĆō1 score, aria-label+title=%), **K dropdown** (10/20/50/100ŌåÆ`limit`); `granularity`+`rerank` threaded through `types`/`api`/`useRawSearch`; hybridŌåÆlexical **fallback forwards granularity**. i18n ├Ś4 (en/vi/ja/zh-TW, +7 keys). **vitest 23/23 ┬Ę tsc 0.** **/review-impl MED-1 fixed:** Mine (block) now sends **`rerank=false`** so it stays *exhaustive* ŌĆö rerank's 0.30 floor was silently pruning it (rerank stays on for Navigate); LOW-2 fixed (score-bar a11y). **Browser smoke PASSED (2026-06-08, this worktree vite :5175 ŌåÆ live stack, õĖćÕÅżńź×ÕĖØ eval book):** `ķŠÖĶ▒ĪĶł¼Ķŗź` ŌåÆ Navigate reranked **98% ń¼¼5ń½ĀķŠÖĶ▒ĪĶł¼Ķŗź first** (smooth 98ŌåÆ43 curve, 10 results); **Mine exhaustive 20 results** with native scores (100% lexical-exact + cosine, rerank-off ŌĆö MED-1 fix visually confirmed); relevance **`<meter>`** bars + aria-labels, CJK highlights, draft/canon surfaces all render; **0 console errors**.

**P3-C semantic precise-scroll + copy-exact (XL, 2026-06-08):** clicking a semantic hit now scrolls to the matched passage (was: chapter top). **book-service** `getInternalBookChapter` returns `block_indices` (ordered). **knowledge** `Passage.block_index`; `chunk_text` returns `(chunk, block_pos)`; `get_chapter_text_and_blocks`; ingester maps `block_pos ŌåÆ block_indices[pos]` (P3-C heuristic: text_content = blocks joined by `\n\n`); orchestrator emits `location.blockIndex`. **FE** copy-exact button (a11y) + semantic jump reuses P3-A. i18n ├Ś4. **book go green ┬Ę knowledge pytest 2088 ┬Ę FE vitest 30/30 ┬Ę tsc 0.** **Live:** re-ingest populated `block_index` (varied 0/37/79ŌĆ”); semantic hit ŌåÆ `/read?block=N`; negatives still ŌåÆ0. **/review-impl 2 MED fixed:** MED-1 `_hit_key` now prefers chunkIndex (blockIndex isn't unique across chunks ŌåÆ was dropping distinct semantic passages in fusion); MED-2 ingester disables block-map when paragraph-count ŌēĀ `len(block_indices)` (safe-null vs silent-wrong). Robust mapping (book-service returns block *texts*) + char-level reader highlight stay deferred.

**P3-B canon-lexical (L, 2026-06-08, speculative):** book-service lexical search gained a `surface` axis ŌĆö `draft` (live chapter_blocks, default), `canon` (`lexicalSearchCanonSQL` over published-revision JSONB `_text`, block_index = content-array ordinal), `all` (merge by score). `validateSurface` returns the value; `buildLexicalHit`+`runLexicalSQL` shared across surfaces; both lexical endpoints parse `?surface=`. **book go build+tests green.** **Unverified live ŌĆö no published/canon chapters exist** (PO chose to build speculatively). Proportionate: direct JSONB ILIKE (no `canon_blocks` denormalization). Deferred: orchestrator/FE `surface` wiring + live-verify until a canon corpus exists (`D-RAWSEARCH-CANON-WIRING`); perf (no trigram GIN on JSONB ŌåÆ seq scan) revisit then.

**EVAL-CI (M, 2026-06-08):** `scripts/run_rawsearch_eval.py` gained **per-band metrics** (hybrid hit@k/ndcg@k by exact/phrase/paraphrase/typo), a **`--gate`** threshold check (exit 1 on fail ŌĆö CI-ready), and **`--persist`** (append run summary to `eval/rawsearch_eval_runs.jsonl`). Thresholds live in the golden (`thresholds` block, overridable) + runner defaults. **Live: GATE PASS** (hybrid hit@5 1.0/ndcg@10 0.866, lexical-oracle 0.895, ANN 0.989, neg-leak 0); per-band shows every band hits@10=1.0, typo ndcg 0.358 (found-but-lower, fuzzy). Deferred (sub-items): 2nd-book golden + Postgres `project_embedding_benchmark_runs` persist (`D-RAWSEARCH-EVAL-CI-PLUS`).

**NEXT (debt campaign COMPLETE 2026-06-08):** all LOW debt cleared/accepted; features P3-C done, P3-B (book-service) done; P3-D' closed. Remaining = blocked-on-data (`D-RAWSEARCH-CANON-WIRING`) + small deferrals below. **Push the new commits** (RERANK-LATENCY/Hardening/P3-D'/P3-C/P3-B/EVAL-CI ŌĆö local since the last push).

**Deferred (raw search) ŌĆö remaining feature work:**
- **D-RAWSEARCH-EVAL-CI-PLUS** ŌĆö EVAL-CI shipped the gate + per-band + JSONL persist; STILL deferred: a 2nd-book golden (needs another ingest) + persisting to the Postgres `project_embedding_benchmark_runs` table (schema adaptation) for cross-run trend tracking.
- **D-RAWSEARCH-CANON-WIRING** (P3-B follow-up) ŌĆö wire `surface=canon|all` through `book_client.lexical_search` + the knowledge orchestrator + a FE surface toggle, and live-verify, once a book has published/canon revisions. The book-service capability (P3-B) is ready + reachable via the external `?surface=` param.
- **D-RAWSEARCH-P3C-ROBUST-MAP** (P3-C follow-up) ŌĆö block-index mapping is a paragraph-resplit heuristic (one non-empty paragraph per block); the robust form has book-service return block *texts* and the ingester map by text (also enables char-level reader highlight via `charStart/End`). Deferred ŌĆö heuristic + safe-null guard (MED-2) cover current data.
- **D-RAWSEARCH-SEED-PAGINATION** (eval tooling) ŌĆö `scripts/seed_rawsearch_eval.py` re-ingest covered 20/40 chapters: the chapters-list GET paginates and re-create of already-existing chapters is skipped, so out=20. Paginate the GET (or upsert-by-title) to re-ingest all 40. Non-product; the 20 un-re-ingested chapters' semantic hits gracefully open top.

**Accepted (won't-fix, with rationale ŌĆö closed in the hardening batch 2026-06-08):**
- **D-RAWSEARCH-TITLE-FORMAT** ŌĆö semantic title "Chapter N ŌĆö Title" vs lexical raw title. A *clean* align needs a raw-title batch endpoint (can't reuse `get_chapter_titles` ŌĆö it's shared with Timeline/Jobs); the denormalized title is functional. Not worth a new endpoint for a cosmetic mixed-list style. Revisit only if a raw-title endpoint lands for other reasons.
- **D-RAWSEARCH-E5B-LOW** ŌĆö (3) `_apply_rerank` drops candidates a *non-conformant* rerank service omits (a conformant one returns all; *empty* is caughtŌåÆdegrade); (4) lexical 160-rune snippet vs semantic full chunk (live scores 0.95ŌĆō0.99, fine); (5) no `/internal/rerank` metrics. Accept ŌĆö add metrics when a monitoring stack exists.
- **D-RAWSEARCH-E6-LOW(4)** ŌĆö rerank-*degraded* hybrid shows raw cosine in the bar (harmless degraded path). Accept.
- **D-RAWSEARCH-E5-LOW** ŌĆö `relevance` "exact" Go `indexRunesFold` vs Postgres `ILIKE` (agree on CJK; only locale-cased Latin could drift); chapter SQL computes `similarity()` twice (Postgres CSEs it). Accept ŌĆö revisit only for Latin corpora / profiled perf.
- **D-RAWSEARCH-P2-COSINE-RANK + P3-D' (MMR/hub-penalty)** ŌĆö semantic raw cosine without MMR/hub-penalty. **Superseded by E5B rerank** (cross-encoder re-ranks candidates query-specifically ŌĆö a generic "hub" passage won't score high for a specific query, subsuming hub-penalty; diversity is covered by the per-chapter cap in Navigate, intentionally off in Mine). Closed 2026-06-08; revisit only if a concrete redundancy problem surfaces.

**RETRO note** (ContextHub MCP offline this session):
- FE: a redundant `onKeyDown` Enter/Space handler on a **native `<button>`** double-fires on Space (button already activates `onClick` on keyup); only add it for `role="button"` non-buttons. Lowering a search min-length to 1 needs an input **debounce**.

### Ō¢Č TRANSLATION PIPELINE V3 (branch `feat/translation-pipeline-v3`)

**State: M0 + M1(aŌĆōd) + M2 + M3 + M4(aŌĆōd) + config-plumbing + M5(aŌĆōd) + M6(a + b-1 + b-2) + M7(a + b + c-1 + c-2 + c-3 + d-1 + d-2 + d-3) DONE** (­¤Åü **M7 feedbackŌåÆlearning track COMPLETE** ŌĆö all 3 channels + judge SDK + judge wired + worker feed; remaining = live-smokes + PR) (**M1d + M4d-1 + M4d-2(a/b/c) + glossary-versioning(VG-1/2/3) + M6b-1/b-2 targeted-propagate DONE 2026-06-07/08**). **­¤Åü Translation V3 plan-of-record COMPLETE ŌĆö all milestones M0ŌĆōM6 shipped incl. the full human-fix flywheel (M6a confirm ŌåÆ M6b-1 targeted per-language stale ŌåÆ M6b-2 surface + user-triggered re-translate); M4d-2 full 2-pass cold-start + the glossary entity-versioning epic landed.**

**­¤åĢ M7 ŌĆö Translation Feedback ŌåÆ Learning (NEW track, 2026-06-08).** Production-readiness gate: translation was **not wired to learning-service at all** ŌĆö no signal collected for future tuning (PO: won't merge to main until translation production-ready). User priority: capture **human review + adjustment** + an **LLM-action log**. **Spec:** [`2026-06-08-translation-feedback-to-learning.md`](../specs/2026-06-08-translation-feedback-to-learning.md). **PO (CLARIFY 2026-06-08):** 3 channels, **build the human-edit feature** (M7c ŌĆö it doesn't exist yet; `TranslationViewer` is read-only), slice per channel + checkpoint, no AMAW. Slices: **M7a** Channel-2 LLM-log ┬Ę **M7b** Channel-1a existing human signals ┬Ę **M7c** Channel-1b human-edit + before/after gold ┬Ę **M7d** Channel-3 online judge.

**M7a shipped (Channel 2 ŌĆö LLM action log, cross-service, 2026-06-08).** translation `chapter_worker._emit_translation_quality` emits `translation.quality` (**`aggregate_type='translation'` ŌåÆ auto-routes to `loreweave:events:translation`** ŌĆö the relay keys the stream by aggregate_type, so NO compose/relay change + translation DB already a source) carrying the V3 verifier rollup + per-issue-type counts; **skips when `quality_score` NULL (V2)**; **post-commit + best-effort** (telemetry must not roll back a translation). learning `+loreweave:events:translation` stream + `handle_translation_quality` (mirrors Q3 chat-feedback) ŌåÆ `persist_consumed_score(target_kind='translation', metric='translation_quality_score', source='auto')` + dispatcher register + score_config seed; one metric/event (dedup `origin_service`+`outbox_id`) with the breakdown stashed in `comment`. **500 translation + 113 learning passed.** **/review-impl: 1 HIGH + 1 MED fixed** ŌĆö HIGH: `quality_score()` is an int **[0,100]** but the score_config is **[0,1]** ŌåÆ would have DLQ'd **100% of events (zero data collected)**; fixed by normalising `/100` at emit (+ realistic 0-100 tests incl. `100ŌåÆ1.0`). MED: emit was in the persist txn ŌåÆ moved post-commit/best-effort. *(This HIGH is the same cross-service scale-mismatch bug class logged in memory.)* Live-smoke deferred ŌåÆ **D-TRANSL-M7A-LIVE-SMOKE**.

**M7d-3 shipped (Channel 3 ŌĆö worker feed, 2026-06-08). ­¤Åü LAST M7 slice ŌĆö closes the feedbackŌåÆlearning track.** translation `chapter_worker._emit_translation_quality` now carries a truncated `source_text` + `translated_text` in the `translation.quality` payload (the exact keys the M7d-2 hook reads) **when `translation_judge_feed_enabled` is on (off by default)** ŌåÆ activates the online fidelity judge end-to-end. config `+translation_judge_feed_enabled=False` + `+translation_judge_feed_max_chars=2000` (**INDEPENDENT** of learning's `online_translation_judge_enabled` ŌĆö both must be on for a judge to actually run, so feed-on alone is harmless = a clean double-gate). Off-default ŌćÆ payload **byte-identical to M7a**; empty source (block chapter w/ empty `text_content`) ŌćÆ feed skipped, hook inert. Single-service (translation only). **513 py (+6 feed tests).** **/review-impl: 1 MED fixed** ŌĆö independent **char**-truncation of source vs translation misaligns the story span across languages (2000 zh chars Ōē½ 2000 vi chars of story ŌåÆ judge reads the translation as "omits the back half" ŌåÆ systematically low fidelity for the CJKŌåÆLatin pairs this channel tunes; the **cross-service-normalization-bug-class** in memory). Fixed: sample both by the **same fraction** of their own length (`frac = min(1, cap/len(src), cap/len(tr))`), so spans align AND stay Ōēż cap; `cap<=0` now skips the feed; +asymmetric-length + cap-guard tests. Live activation (feedŌåÆjudge E2E) rides with **D-TRANSL-M7D-INLINE-JUDGE** (judge stays OFF until out-of-band). **­¤Åü M7 = a+b+c-1+c-2+c-3+d-1+d-2+d-3 ALL DONE.**

**M7d-2 shipped (Channel 3 ŌĆö judge wired into learning, 2026-06-08).** learning consumes the SDK fidelity judge. config `+online_translation_judge_enabled` (off; reuses the `online_judge_model_ref/source/user_id` + `provider_registry_internal_url` + `internal_service_token`). `db/online_translation_judge.py`: `run_translation_judge` (wraps `judge_translation_fidelity`) + `persist_translation_judge` ŌåÆ `persist_consumed_score(target_kind='translation', metric='translation_judge_fidelity', source='auto', origin_event_id='judge:<outbox_id>'` ŌĆö **distinct from M7a's bare `<outbox_id>` so no double-row from the same event** ŌĆö `comment={reason,judge_model,panel_safe:false}`). `handle_translation_quality` `+_maybe_judge_translation` hook: gated (enabled Ōł¦ model Ōł¦ event carries source+translated [the M7d-3 feed]) + best-effort + lazy-import. score_config seeded. **130 learning passed (+5).** **/review-impl: 0 HIGH; 1 MED DEFERRED** ŌĆö the judge runs **inline** in the main learning consumer ŌåÆ an LLM call blocks the loop (all streams) when enabled; off-by-default = zero shipped impact, but **keep `online_translation_judge_enabled` OFF until the judge runs out-of-band + sampled** (D-TRANSL-M7D-INLINE-JUDGE). **Inert until M7d-3** (the worker feed) ŌĆö the LAST M7 slice.

**M7d-1 shipped (Channel 3 ŌĆö SDK translation-fidelity judge, 2026-06-08).** First sub-slice of M7d (PO: full production feed + judge in `loreweave_eval`; M7d sub-sliced d-1 SDK judge ŌåÆ d-2 learning run/persist/config/handler-hook ŌåÆ d-3 worker inline feed off-default). `loreweave_eval.llm_judge` `+judge_translation_fidelity(source, translated) ŌåÆ FidelityVerdict(score[0,1], reason)` + `_FIDELITY_SYSTEM` prompt (rate meaning-fidelity, NOT fluency; JSON `{score,reason}`), built on the shared `_call_judge` + `_extract_json_object` (one LLM call, best-effort `None` on empty/bad/out-of-range/non-completed). Reuses the `JudgeLLMClient` Protocol (same as `judge_precision`). **SDK fidelity 6/6 + eval suite 29 (no regression).** **/review-impl: 1 LOW-MED fixed** ŌĆö the test now asserts the judge is *fed* source+translated correctly labeled (a swap would fail), not just that the response parses. SDK-only; prompt accuracy live-validates when M7d-2/3 wire it. **M7d-2 (learning) + M7d-3 (worker feed) remain ŌĆö the last M7 work.**

**M7c-3 shipped (name-confirm capture, cross-service, 2026-06-08).** The M6a "confirm a name" action (`useConfirmName` ŌåÆ `patchTranslation`/`createTranslation` with `confidence='verified'`) now feeds learning. glossary `outbox.go`: `nameConfirmedPayload` + `buildNameConfirmedPayload` (pure) + `emitNameConfirmed` (best-effort post-commit, actor=user, source name via `loadEntityEventFields`); `attribute_handler` emits `glossary.name_confirmed` on `createTranslation` (when `confidence=='verified'`) + `updateTranslation` (confidence-in-patch Ōł¦ verified ŌĆö so editing a verified name's value alone doesn't re-fire). **Separate** from `glossary.entity_updated` (which is actor=pipeline, drives M6b-1 staleness). learning `handle_name_confirmed` ŌåÆ `persist_consumed_score(target_kind='glossary', metric='glossary_name_confirmed'=1.0, source='human', comment={sourceŌåÆtarget, language})` + register + seed. **glossary `go test ./...` ok (+1 builder unit) + learning 125 (+4).** **/review-impl: 0 HIGH/MED** ŌĆö load-bearing check passed (both M6a caller paths hit the wired endpoints ŌåÆ not dead code); 3 LOW accepted. Live-smoke deferred ŌåÆ **D-TRANSL-M7C3-LIVE-SMOKE**. **­¤Åü Channel 1 (human signals) complete: M7b accept + M7c human-edit + M7c-3 name-confirm. M7d (online judge) is the last M7 slice.**

**M7c-2 shipped (Channel 1b FE ŌĆö editable translation + Save, 2026-06-08).** Makes the M7c-1 gold reachable: users can now actually edit a translation. `hooks/useEditTranslation` (MVC controller ŌĆö edit/save/cancel, format-aware payload) + `TranslationViewer` Edit mode: reuses the existing `<TiptapEditor>` (json/blocks) or a `<textarea>` (text) ŌåÆ Save calls `versionsApi.saveEditedVersion` (`POST .../versions/edit`) ŌåÆ new human version ŌåÆ gold flows; Cancel discards. No conflict with `ChapterEditorPage` (that edits the chapter *draft* via book-service). i18n ├Ś4. **vitest 6 (format-aware payload, error keeps editing, cancel, no-op skip) + translation feature 19 + tsc clean.** **/review-impl: 1 LOW-MED fixed** ŌĆö a no-op Save created a junk version + no-op gold row; now an unchanged **text** edit is skipped (json no-ops are filterable downstream by `change_magnitude=0` ŌåÆ **D-TRANSL-M7C2-DIRTY**). The LLMŌåÆhuman diff is now the tuning gold. **507 translation (+4) + 121 learning (+4).** **/review-impl: 1 LOW fixed** (test now pins the INSERT shape ŌĆö `authored_by='human'`/parent/`MAX+1` ŌĆö not just the mocked response; same gap-class that hid M7a's HIGH) + 3 LOW documented. Live-smoke deferred ŌåÆ **D-TRANSL-M7C-LIVE-SMOKE**. **M7c-2 (FE editable view + Save) + M7c-3 (name-confirm) remain.**

**M7b shipped (Channel 1a ŌĆö existing human signals, cross-service, 2026-06-08).** PO: M7b = **set-active + publish-accept** only; **name-confirm deferred to M7c** (it's a correction). `set_active_version` (versions.py ŌĆö **human-only**; the worker auto-activates via a different path, so it emits nothing ŌåÆ no false human signal) emits `translation.reviewed` (best-effort post-INSERT, `+book_id` to SELECT) ŌåÆ learning `handle_translation_reviewed` ŌåÆ `persist_consumed_score(target_kind='translation', metric='translation_human_accept'=1.0, source='human')`. **High-value case:** `acknowledge_issues=true` = the human published **despite N verifier flags** ŌåÆ verifier-calibration signal (carried in `comment`). **503 translation (+3) + 117 learning (+4).** **/review-impl: 0 HIGH/MED, 3 LOW** (documented). **ŌÜĀ Metric-interpretation note:** `translation_human_accept` is **skewed toward gate-overrides + version-switches** ŌĆö clean chapters auto-activate (worker), so the human never hits this endpoint and produces no signal. Read it as "human published this version" (mostly flagged-overrides via `comment.acknowledged_issues`), NOT "human approved a clean translation." Implicit satisfaction (read-without-edit) is uncapturable until M7c's edit feature. Live-smoke deferred ŌåÆ **D-TRANSL-M7B-LIVE-SMOKE**.
